/CAL:SENTENCING/ARBUCKLE/AJW/CH1:SP 3 Y:U:ESS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y/CTS:71/X:SENTENCE MAY BE SERVED THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM, IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE THE PROGRAM, HE WILL RECEIVE NO CREDIT/X:AS TO COUNT 004, DEFT IS TO SERVE 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL SERVABLE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM TO RUN CONCURRENT TO COUNTS 002 AND 003/WEAP/DTC/RX/DNACOMP/STATES/WS/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/CCC:002,003,004/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/
